name: Inuarashi (Reprint)
effect_text: [DON!! x2][When Attacking] You may trash 1 card from your hand: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards.[Trigger] If your opponent has 3 or less Life cards, play this card.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP06 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
